title: Add non-record 11L int6 challenger 8xH100 attempt
body:
## Summary
- add a non-record `/records` folder for an 11-layer int6 challenger attempt
- include the exact challenger code snapshot used for the strongest 8xH100 run and the copied remote `train.log`
- document the best measured result: `1.1624` pre-roundtrip BPB at the `600s` cap on `8xH100`, with the provider terminating the pod during export before a final roundtrip score could be recorded

## Why non-record
This is not claiming a leaderboard score. The strongest run reached the training-phase validation point and logged `val_bpb:1.1624`, but RunPod terminated the pod during export before the post-roundtrip metric was printed. I am submitting it as a candid non-record / in-progress attempt rather than a record claim.

## Validation
- `python3 -m py_compile records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/train_gpt.py records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/root_train_gpt_vendor.py records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/lowbit_utils.py records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/optimizer_variants.py records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/validation_utils.py records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_11LInt6Challenger_8xH100_Preroundtrip/mlp_variants.py`
